membership_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

root.sql: select sum(tab.row_memno)over(order by tab.membership_no , tab.loan_contract_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( select decode(lag(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,0,1 ) as row_memno , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as groupname , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth , '!date_of_birth_1!' as date_of_birth_1 , '!date_of_birth_2!' as date_of_birth_2 , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest , sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , '('||to_snumber((sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate * 100))||'%'||')' as loan_interest_rate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate) as sys_date , (select tab.loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card tab where tab.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and tab.loan_type = '01' )as atm_emer , (select max(sc_atm_ucf_modify_status.modify_desc) from sc_atm_ucf_modify_status , sc_atm_m_chg_loan_det where sc_atm_ucf_modify_status.modify_status = sc_atm_m_chg_loan_det.chg_status and sc_atm_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = '01' ) as atm_status from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_int_step_rate , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > '0' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth between '01/10/1961' and '01/10/1962' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) tab
